title: ETHTrustFund - Rekt
relevance_summary: rug pull involving a project that raised funds through a treasury and then moved them to a new wallet, leading to significant losses.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a treasury contract to a new wallet address.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds from a treasury contract to a new wallet address.
summary: ETHTrustFund, a project on Base Network, raised over $2 million and then moved all funds to a new wallet, leading to significant investor losses. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that sends funds from a treasury contract to a new wallet.
